allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/events/process -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"text": "Parenthesis Event\\n\\nDate: 25 July 2026\\nTime: 3:00 PM\\nVenue: Online\\nRegister: https://example.com/event\(2026\)"}')
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/events/process -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"text":"Event No Year\\n\\nDate: 12 April\\nTime: 2pm\\nVenue: Online"}')
Bash(curl -s --max-time 10 -X POST http://localhost:8000/events/process -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"text":"Event No Year\\n\\nDate: 12 April\\nTime: 2pm\\nVenue: Online"}')
Bash(curl -s --max-time 10 -X POST http://localhost:8000/events/process -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"text":"Event Full Date\\n\\nDate: 13 April 2025\\nTime: 2pm\\nVenue: Online"}')
Bash(curl -s --max-time 10 -X POST http://localhost:8000/events/process -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"text":"Event Range\\n\\nDate: 12-13 April 2025\\nTime: 2pm\\nVenue: Online"}')
Bash(curl -s --max-time 10 -X POST http://localhost:8000/events/process -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"text":"Event No Date\\n\\nTime: 2pm\\nVenue: Online"}')
Bash(curl -s --max-time 10 -X POST http://localhost:8000/events/process -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"text":"Minimal Event\\n\\nDate: 1 August 2026\\nTime: 2pm\\nVenue: Online"}')

Bash(curl -s --max-time 10 -X POST http://localhost:8000/events/process -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"text":"Full Event\\n\\nDate: 15 August 2026\\nTime: 10:00 AM - 4:00 PM\\nVenue: Dewan Utama\\nFee: RM10\\nRegister: https://example.com/register"}')
